title: Fix MonitorAndCancelOnFaultAsync Bare Catch — Add Error Logging
description:
CRITICAL finding from Error Handling Auditor. MonitorAndCancelOnFaultAsync at AgentBackgroundService.cs:507 has a bare `catch { cts.Cancel(); throw; }` with no exception logging. The original exception context (type, message, stack) is invisible until the outer handler — which may itself lose context (see TSK-0139).

Fix: Add `logger.LogError(ex, "Unhandled exception in monitored task — cancelling CTS.")` before the rethrow.

Source: Sprint 51 Council, Error Handling Auditor, Finding F-BARECATCH
